title: Inception
logline: A skilled thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O., but his tragic past begins to sabotage the mission from within.
antagonistOrConflict: Mal (Cobb's projection of his deceased wife) and Cobb's own guilt; externally, the mission to perform inception on Robert Fischer
tone: Cerebral, suspenseful, emotionally haunting, visually inventive
themes: The power and danger of ideas

actBreaks.description: The team assembles and Cobb presents the full inception plan to plant the idea in Fischer's mind, shifting from recruitment to active mission preparation.

validation.ruling: Scene #57 functions as Act 1's climax: Cobb tests Ariadne with the maze challenge and she passes by thinking unconventionally (drawing concentric circles), proving herself worthy—this irreversible decision to recruit her fundamentally shifts the story from setup to team assembly, occurring at the correct position (19.7%) and forcing new, higher-stakes conflict as the heist preparation begins.

actBreaks.description: The team enters the van and begins the three-level dream heist, transitioning from preparation to full execution of the inception.

validation.ruling: Scene #147 marks Act 2's end: the team loads the kidnapped Fischer and wounded Saito into the van, Eames destroys a sniper with a grenade launcher, and they prepare to break out—this irreversible escalation transitions from the warehouse dream level to the multi-layered dream heist, fundamentally changing the story's direction at 65.3% into higher-stakes territory with no possibility of return.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: Inception employs a nested, non-linear structure that mirrors its own subject matter—dreams within dreams within dreams. The script opens with a flash-forward (the elderly Japanese man scene) that won't resolve until the climax, immediately establishing temporal disorientation. The first act intercuts between the failed Saito extraction and Cobb's recruitment of the team, using dream logic to fragment chronology. Act Two is dominated by planning, training Ariadne, and revealing Cobb's tragic backstory through memory fragments. The final act executes the three-level heist with surgical precision, cross-cutting between simultaneous dream layers where time moves at different speeds. This creates a structural accordion effect: scenes in the van (real time) are stretched across dozens of hotel scenes (dream time), which are stretched across even more snow fortress scenes (deeper dream time). The script's architecture is its content—Nolan builds a narrative that operates exactly like the dreams it depicts.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The pacing operates on multiple temporal tracks simultaneously. The opening 45 pages establish the world through rapid scene fragmentation (scenes 1-57 average barely over a page each), creating disorientation that mirrors dream instability. The middle section (scenes 58-116) slows considerably for exposition and character work, particularly Ariadne's training sequences and Cobb's confession about Mal. The final 30 pages (scenes 117-285) explode into relentless cross-cutting between three dream levels plus the plane, with scene length collapsing to mere moments as tension compounds. The van chase in 'reality' stretches across 40+ scenes while occupying only minutes of story time, while the snow fortress assault unfolds in what feels like real-time but represents hours in the dream. This creates a unique rhythm where the script simultaneously accelerates and decelerates depending on which layer you're tracking.

incitingIncident.description: Saito sits beside a beaten and bloody Nash in the helicopter, offers Cobb a gun to kill Nash for selling them out, but Cobb refuses and asks what Saito will do to Nash, to which Saito replies nothing but he can't work in my world anymore.

validation.ruling: Scene #50 shatters Cobb's status quo by introducing Saito's impossible job offer of inception in exchange for a way home to his children, establishing the central conflict and forcing Cobb to confront a choice he cannot ignore—this irreversibly sets the main story in motion at the correct structural position (15%).

midpoint.description: Cobb remembers that Mal's letter to authorities refuted all claims about her sanity that she knew he would make.

validation.ruling: Scene #143 is merely Cobb remembering Mal's letter and lacks dramatic action. Scene #142 (p91, 62%) is the true midpoint: Mal threatens to jump from the hotel ledge on their anniversary, forcing Cobb onto the ledge with her in a life-or-death confrontation that reveals the core trauma driving his guilt—this is the emotional point of no return that raises stakes and shifts Cobb's internal journey from reactive to proactive.

climax.description: Fischer's father reaches for the safe, Fischer opens it with the code to find the will and a homemade pinwheel he made as a child, marvels at it, then turns to find his father dead as Eames hits the detonator.

validation.ruling: Scene #269 delivers the climax: Fischer reconciles with his dying father, discovers the pinwheel in the safe (completing the inception), and his father dies—this resolves the main story question of whether inception will succeed, demonstrates the team's arc completion, and occurs at the correct position (96.6%) as the peak emotional confrontation before resolution.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEGANT DINING ROOM, JAPANESE CASTLE - LATER
scenes.summary: A Security Guard shows an Elderly Japanese Man a handgun and a small pewter cone, prompting the Elderly Man to stop eating and request the items' owner be brought to him with food.

scenes.heading: INT. SAME - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: The Elderly Japanese Man slides a handgun toward a Bearded Man who is eating, asks if he's here to kill him, then picks up and spins a top while stating he's seen one before many years ago.

scenes.heading: INT. SAME ELEGANT DINING ROOM - NIGHT (YEARS EARLIER)
scenes.summary: Cobb pitches to Saito the concept that ideas are resilient and contagious like viruses, explaining that in the dream state conscious defenses are lowered and thoughts become vulnerable to theft.

scenes.heading: INT. BULLET TRAIN COMPARTMENT - DAY (FEELS LIKE DIFFERENT TIME)
scenes.summary: Todashi monitors four sleeping men connected by yellow tubes in a bullet train compartment, checking his watch as another train passes and Nash jerks with the movement.

scenes.heading: INT. FILTHY BATHROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: An explosion occurs and Nash checks on the sleeping Cobb.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROOFTOP TERRACES, JAPANESE CASTLE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: A tremor rumbles through the castle as Cobb and Arthur discuss that Saito knows their plan, while Cobb spots Mal staring at the sea and tells Arthur she shouldn't be there.

scenes.heading: INT. BEDROOM SUITE, JAPANESE CASTLE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Cobb ties Mal to a chair with rope in a bedroom suite while she questions whether he still dreams about her, and he tells her to stay out of this.

scenes.heading: EXT. JAPANESE CASTLE WALL - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb rappels down the castle wall and suddenly starts dropping.

scenes.heading: INT. BEDROOM SUITE, JAPANESE CASTLE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The empty chair slides across the floor and wedges under the window.

scenes.heading: EXT. JAPANESE CASTLE WALL - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb jolts to a stop fifteen feet lower, looks up at the bedroom window, shakes his head, and starts climbing back.

scenes.heading: INT. KITCHEN, JAPANESE CASTLE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Cobb drops into the darkened kitchen through a window and pulls out a pistol with a silencer as he moves across the room.

scenes.heading: INT. HALL, JAPANESE CASTLE-CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb shoots a guard in the head with a silenced pistol and catches him, lowering him silently to the floor.

scenes.heading: INT. DINING ROOM, JAPANESE CASTLE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb opens a safe and takes an envelope, but lights come on revealing Saito and Mal with a gun, who forces Cobb to place his weapon on the floor after guards drag in Arthur.
scenes.turningPointNote: The extraction mission is compromised as Cobb is caught by Saito and Mal, forcing him to surrender.

scenes.heading: INT. FILTHY BATHROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Arthur wakes in the bathroom and yanks free his tubes, telling Nash they must reconnect the loop before the others wake, then rushes to Saito who is stirring on the bed.

scenes.heading: INT. JAPANESE CASTLE CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Cobb lurches toward the stairs as the building bucks and heaves around him.

scenes.heading: INT. DINING ROOM, JAPANESE CASTLE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito and the guards panic during the destruction while Mal calmly picks up the envelope and tells Saito that Cobb was very close.

scenes.heading: EXT. GRAND STAIRCASE, JAPANESE CASTLE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb runs up the stairs pulling out a second envelope.

scenes.heading: INT. DINING ROOM, JAPANESE CASTLE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito rips open the envelope to find blank sheets of paper, panics and orders guards to stop Cobb, while Mal smiles amused.

scenes.heading: INT. GRAND STAIRCASE, JAPANESE CASTLE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb runs up the stairs reading typewritten sheets from his envelope.

scenes.heading: INT. DILAPIDATED HOTEL ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Arthur works frantically on the silver case mechanism while glancing at Saito's stirring face, telling Nash he won't make it and to wake Cobb.

scenes.heading: INT. FILTHY BATHROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Nash turns to Cobb and smacks him across the face.

scenes.heading: INT. GRAND STAIRCASE, JAPANESE CASTLE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Cobb is smashed sideways off his feet.

scenes.heading: INT. DINING ROOM, JAPANESE CASTLE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The ceiling cracks above Saito and a ton of stone floods down onto him.

scenes.heading: INT. DILAPIDATED HOTEL ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Saito's eyes flicker open as he wakes.

scenes.heading: INT. FILTHY BATHROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Nash smacks Cobb again, saying he won't wake.

scenes.heading: INT. DILAPIDATED HOTEL ROOM-CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur connects the second tube to Saito and tells Nash to dunk Cobb, but Saito puts a gun to Arthur's head and gestures for silence.

scenes.heading: INT. FILTHY BATHROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Nash pushes Cobb's forehead backward and Cobb starts to fall backwards in the chair in slow motion.

scenes.heading: INT. GRAND STAIRCASE, JAPANESE CASTLE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Cobb picks himself up and scrambles to read the last sheet of paper looking puzzled as bullets hit around him and guards race up the stairs.

scenes.heading: INT. FILTHY BATHROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb in slow motion hits the water with his head thrashing as he goes under.

scenes.heading: INT. GRAND STAIRCASE, JAPANESE CASTLE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Water explodes through all the windows flooding the hall and swamping Cobb, spinning him in all directions until he breaks the surface gasping for air in a bathtub.

scenes.heading: INT. FILTHY BATHROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb wakes gasping in the bathtub, then launches himself out to slam Saito against the door, knocking the gun away and punching Saito to end the struggle.
scenes.turningPointNote: Cobb wakes from the dream and physically subdues Saito in the real hotel room.

scenes.heading: INT. DILAPIDATED HOTEL ROOM - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Cobb confronts Saito about bringing a gun and finding the secret apartment, revealing he knows about Saito's affair, then asks why Saito let them in at all as rioting sounds grow louder outside.

scenes.heading: INT. BULLET TRAIN COMPARTMENT - DAY
scenes.summary: Todashi slips headphones over Nash's ears and pulls out an MP3 player.

scenes.heading: INT. DILAPIDATED HOTEL ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Saito reveals the extraction was an audition and that Cobb failed because his deception was readily apparent despite extracting the information.

scenes.heading: INT. BULLET TRAIN COMPARTMENT - DAY
scenes.summary: Todashi waits for the first countdown to hit thirty seconds, then hits play on the MP3 player and raises the volume as Edith Piaf's song begins playing through Nash's headphones.

scenes.heading: INT. DILAPIDATED HOTEL ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Massive slowed-down music begins in the background as Cobb grabs Saito and puts his head to the floor with a gun pressed to his cheek, demanding to know what Saito knows while Arthur checks his watch.

scenes.heading: INT. BULLET TRAIN COMPARTMENT - DAY
scenes.summary: Todashi watches the first countdown hit zero as Arthur begins to stir.

scenes.heading: INT. DILAPIDATED HOTEL ROOM-DAY
scenes.summary: Saito realizes he's still dreaming and tells Cobb he's lived up to his reputation by creating a dream within a dream, then Cobb looks over to find Arthur has vanished.
scenes.turningPointNote: Saito realizes they're in a dream within a dream, exposing the deeper layer of the extraction attempt.

scenes.heading: INT. BULLET TRAIN COMPARTMENT - DAY
scenes.summary: Arthur's eyes flicker open as he wakes and rips at his tubes, telling Todashi it didn't go well, then checks the remaining countdowns.

scenes.heading: INT. DILAPIDATED HOTEL ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Saito gets to his feet admiring Cobb's dream within a dream while Cobb lowers his gun defeated and glances at his watch as music reverberates and rioters bang on the door.

scenes.heading: INT. BULLET TRAIN COMPARTMENT - DAY
scenes.summary: Arthur retracts the tubes into the case as he watches the next countdown hit zero.

scenes.heading: INT. DILAPIDATED HOTEL ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Nash reveals they're in his dream not Saito's, then vanishes along with Cobb as rioters smash through the door and swarm the room, leaving Saito standing in dwindling light and silence.

scenes.heading: INT. BULLET TRAIN COMPARTMENT - DAY
scenes.summary: Nash wakes to Arthur furiously confronting him about getting the carpet wrong, while Cobb pulls Arthur away and announces he's getting off at Kyoto, refusing to explain why despite Arthur's protests.

scenes.heading: EXT. JAPANESE COUNTRYSIDE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The bullet train speeds through the Japanese countryside.

scenes.heading: INT. BULLET TRAIN COMPARTMENT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito wakes gently in the empty compartment, notices a small mark on his wrist, rubs it, and smiles.

scenes.heading: EXT. TOKYO - DUSK
scenes.summary: A helicopter approaches a rooftop helipad on a Tokyo high rise at dusk.

scenes.heading: INT. APARTMENT, TOKYO - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb waits restlessly in an apartment, checks his loaded handgun, then spins a pewter top and studies it intently until it wobbles and tips over, after which he answers a phone call from his children asking when he's coming home and he tells them he can't for a while.

scenes.heading: INT. CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb tells Arthur he's going to Buenos Aires to lie low while Arthur heads stateside, and Arthur sympathetically sends Cobb's regards.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROOFTOP HELIPAD - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Cobb and Arthur reach the helicopter on the rooftop pad, the door slides open, and Cobb steps up and freezes.

scenes.heading: INT. HELICOPTER ON PAD - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito sits beside a beaten and bloody Nash in the helicopter, offers Cobb a gun to kill Nash for selling them out, but Cobb refuses and asks what Saito will do to Nash, to which Saito replies nothing but he can't work in my world anymore.
scenes.turningPointNote: Saito reveals Nash's betrayal and demonstrates his power over the team's future employment, setting up his leverage over Cobb.

scenes.heading: EXT. AIRFIELD - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: The helicopter lands next to a private jet on an airfield.

scenes.heading: INT. HELICOPTER - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito offers Cobb a way home to America and his children in exchange for performing inception on Robert Fischer, the son of his dying competitor, despite Arthur's objections.
scenes.turningPointNote: Saito's offer to get Cobb home in exchange for inception establishes the central mission and stakes of the film.

scenes.heading: INT. PRIVATE JET - LATER
scenes.summary: On the private jet, Cobb reveals to Arthur that he has performed inception before and it worked, then says they need to recruit a new architect in Paris.

scenes.heading: INT. GREAT HALL, ÉCOLE D'ARCHITECTURE - MORNING
scenes.summary: Cobb arrives at the École d'Architecture carrying a shopping bag and finds Professor Miles in a lecture hall.

scenes.heading: INT. LECTURE HALL - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb asks Miles to deliver gifts to his children and arrange a meeting, but Miles refuses, saying Cobb's ex-wife blames Miles as much as Cobb and that the children need more than occasional stuffed animals.

scenes.heading: INT. CORRIDOR - LATER
scenes.summary: Miles introduces Cobb to his student Ariadne and mentions a job offer.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROOFTOP, ÉCOLE D'ARCHITECTURE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Cobb tests Ariadne by having her draw mazes for him to solve, which he does easily by watching her create them, hinting the job is not strictly legal.

scenes.heading: EXT. NARROW STREET, PARIS - DAY
scenes.summary: Arthur arrives at a warehouse door and checks an address.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur enters the large dusty warehouse and looks around approvingly.

scenes.heading: INT. SAME - LATER
scenes.summary: Arthur sets up lawn chairs, a table, and unpacks silver cases containing tubing and mechanisms.

scenes.heading: EXT. PARISIAN CAFE - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb explains to Ariadne how the mind creates and perceives dream worlds simultaneously, and how they can take over the creation process by designing the architecture while the subject's mind populates it.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - DAY
scenes.summary: Ariadne wakes from a dream with glass in her face, and Cobb explains that pain in dreams feels real and that architects were recruited to design training dreams for the military.

scenes.heading: EXT. SAME PARISIAN STREET - DAY
scenes.summary: In a dream recreation of Paris, Cobb explains that his subconscious projections populate Ariadne's architecture, and when Ariadne tries to manipulate physics by bending the street, the projections turn hostile and Mal stabs her.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP-DAY
scenes.summary: Ariadne wakes breathing hard and learns she can only wake from a dream by dying; Cobb says she needs a totem and Ariadne angrily calls out his dangerous subconscious projection of Mal.

scenes.heading: INT. BATHROOM, WORKSHOP - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb spins his pewter spinning top on the bathroom counter.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur explains to Ariadne that a totem must be a personal object with unique weight or movement that only the owner knows.

scenes.heading: INT. BATHROOM, WORKSHOP - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb studies the spinning top as its rotation becomes increasingly eccentric.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur shows Ariadne his loaded die totem but refuses to let her handle it, explaining no one else can know its weight or balance.

scenes.heading: INT. BATHROOM, WORKSHOP - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb's spinning top wobbles and falls over.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ariadne tells Arthur she won't open her mind to Cobb because he has buried problems, and Cobb emerges saying she'll return because one reality won't be enough for her.

scenes.heading: INT. GAMBLING DEN, MOMBASA - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb finds Eames gambling in a Mombasa den and offers him a job after Eames loses his last chips but mysteriously produces stacks to cash out.

scenes.heading: INT. STREET, MOMBASA - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eames tells Cobb there's a price on his head from Cobol Engineering but says he has something worth selling when Cobb mentions his offer.

scenes.heading: EXT. BALCONY OF A COFFEE HOUSE - LATER
scenes.summary: Cobb proposes inception to Eames, who says it's possible but difficult and that he's attempted it before without lasting success, then agrees to help after learning the target and fee.

scenes.heading: EXT. STREET, MOMBASA - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb flees through Mombasa streets pursued by businessmen from Cobol Engineering, fighting and weaving through crowds until Saito's car rescues him.

scenes.heading: EXT. COFFEE HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Eames joins Cobb in Saito's car and sarcastically comments on Cobb's method of losing a tail.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - DAY
scenes.summary: Ariadne returns to the workshop despite trying to resist, admitting there's nothing like the direct creation of dreaming, and Arthur offers to show her paradoxical architecture.

scenes.heading: INT. PENROSE STEPS - LATER
scenes.summary: Arthur demonstrates the Penrose Steps to Ariadne, leading her down stairs that impossibly loop back to their starting point.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROOFTOP, OLD TOWN, MOMBASA - DAY
scenes.summary: Saito briefs Cobb and Eames on Robert Fischer and reveals his motive is to prevent Fischer Morrow's monopoly on energy, while Cobb insists on understanding the target because inception will fundamentally change him.

scenes.heading: EXT. DECREPIT BUILDING, MOMBASA - LATER
scenes.summary: Eames leads Cobb and Saito down steps to a doorway in a decrepit building.

scenes.heading: INT. STAIRWELL - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The group ascends a peeling stairwell to a wire-reinforced glass door.

scenes.heading: INT. PHARMACY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Yusuf shows the group his custom Somnacin compound and demonstrates its potency, then leads them to see his dream-sharing operation.

scenes.heading: INT. BACK ROOM, PHARMACY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Yusuf shows them a room where eighteen to twenty people lie connected on cots, sharing dreams for three to four hours daily, which equals forty years in dream time, and demonstrates the sedative's power when a sleeper doesn't wake from a slap.

scenes.heading: INT. SAME - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Cobb lies on a cot and falls asleep under Yusuf's compound as the sound of a freight train builds.

scenes.heading: EXT. WASTELAND - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb lies with his cheek pressed to a metal rail as a deafening train approaches.

scenes.heading: INT. BACK ROOM, PHARMACY - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb wakes and Yusuf comments on the sharpness of the compound's effect.

scenes.heading: INT. BATHROOM, PHARMACY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb splashes water on his face, has a flash of Mal, tries to spin his top but it falls and rolls toward Saito, who asks if everything is alright.

scenes.heading: INT. BACK ROOM, WORKSHOP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Ariadne works on modifying a brass chess piece totem when she hears a noise.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ariadne finds Cobb unpacking dream equipment alone and he reveals his spinning top was Mal's totem, admitting she died, then asks about Ariadne's maze progress.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb briefs the team on planting the idea that Robert Fischer will split up his father's empire, explaining they must go three dream levels deep and translate the business strategy into emotional concepts.
scenes.turningPointNote: The team's strategy session establishes the three-level dream structure and emotional approach that will drive the entire heist.

scenes.heading: EXT. NEW YORK STREETS - DAY
scenes.summary: The team discusses in a deserted New York intersection how to split the inception idea into emotional triggers across three levels, from opening Fischer's relationship with his father to making him believe his father doesn't want him to follow in his footsteps.

scenes.heading: INT. ANTEROOM, MAURICE FISCHER'S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Eames observes Browning assert dominance over lawyers in Maurice Fischer's anteroom, threatening to relay concerns directly to the dying Maurice.

scenes.heading: INT. MAURICE FISCHER'S INNER OFFICE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Robert Fischer stands in his father's office, which has been converted to a hospital room, and retrieves a framed photograph after Maurice lashes out and knocks items from his bedside table.

scenes.heading: INT. BATHROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Eames practices Browning's gestures and mannerisms in front of a mirror, his reflection showing Browning.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eames explains he will impersonate Browning in the dream to plant suggestions in Fischer's conscious mind, which Fischer's subconscious will then reinforce at deeper levels, making the idea seem self-generated.

scenes.heading: INT. DESERTED HOTEL LOBBY - DAY
scenes.summary: The team discusses how to sedate Fischer, and Saito reveals he will arrange for Fischer to take a twelve-hour flight from Sydney to Los Angeles by causing unexpected maintenance to Fischer's private plane.

scenes.heading: EXT. AIRFIELD - DAY
scenes.summary: Fischer arrives at the airfield and is met by a distraught flight officer at the steps of a jet.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY - DAY
scenes.summary: Saito reveals he bought the entire airline to secure an uninterrupted ten-hour window on a 747, and Cobb compliments Ariadne's lobby design.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - DAY
scenes.summary: Arthur warns that three dream levels will be unstable and collapse with slight disturbance, and Yusuf suggests using powerful sedation for stability.

scenes.heading: INT. MAKESHIFT LAB - DAY
scenes.summary: Yusuf demonstrates the sedative's power by injecting Arthur, who remains unconscious even when Eames slaps him hard.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - DAY
scenes.summary: Yusuf explains the advanced Somnacin compound will accelerate brain function twenty times per level, giving them a week in the first level, six months in the second, and ten years in the third level of dreaming.

scenes.heading: INT. MAKESHIFT LAB - DAY
scenes.summary: Yusuf tips Arthur's chair backward while Arthur sleeps, causing Arthur's body to jerk and his eyes to open just before he hits the floor.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - DAY
scenes.summary: Yusuf explains that leaving inner ear function unimpaired means the sleeper will still feel falling however deep the sleep.

scenes.heading: INT. MAKESHIFT LAB - DAY
scenes.summary: Yusuf leans a sleeping Arthur to one side, causing him to crash down and jerk awake.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - DAY
scenes.summary: Arthur realizes the falling sensation won't penetrate three layers of deep sleep, and Cobb explains they'll synchronize kicks at each level using a musical countdown.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Ariadne finds Cobb asleep and plugged into the dream mechanism, then injects herself and enters the dream.

scenes.heading: INT. CAGE STYLE ELEVATOR - DAY
scenes.summary: Ariadne ascends in a cage elevator and spots a basement button marked 'B' before the elevator stops.

scenes.heading: INT. YOUNG GIRL'S BEDROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Ariadne explores a young girl's bedroom, finds a locked safe inside a doll's house, and is startled by a noise from another room.

scenes.heading: INT. LIVING ROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ariadne watches Cobb and Mal arguing about growing old together and Mal telling Cobb he knows how to find her, until Mal spots Ariadne and freezes with hostility.

scenes.heading: INT. CAGE STYLE ELEVATOR - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb shuts the elevator door and tells Ariadne this is the only way he can still dream, revealing that in his dreams he's still with his family, before the children run away without turning around.

scenes.heading: INT. CAGE STYLE ELEVATOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ariadne confronts Cobb about using memories and keeping Mal alive, and Cobb admits these are moments he regrets that he turned into dreams to change them, then stops Ariadne from pressing the basement button.

scenes.heading: INT. KITCHEN, COBB AND MAL'S HOUSE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Cobb shows Ariadne his house with Mal, explains Mal had already died, and watches his children James and Philippa in the garden while a thin man holds a folded piece of paper.

scenes.heading: INT. CAGE STYLE ELEVATOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ariadne presses the basement button and descends past glimpses of various floors until the elevator stops at a hotel suite.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEGANT HOTEL SUITE - CONTINUOUS (NOW NIGHT)
scenes.summary: Ariadne enters a disheveled hotel suite and encounters Mal, who questions her presence and tells her a riddle about waiting for a train, then becomes increasingly aggressive.

scenes.heading: INT. CAGE STYLE ELEVATOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb pulls Ariadne into the elevator as Mal throws herself against the grill like a wild animal, screaming that Cobb promised they'd be together and grow old together.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Ariadne confronts Cobb about building a prison of memories to contain Mal, and when Saito and Arthur arrive with news that Maurice Fischer died, Cobb decides they must move immediately.
scenes.turningPointNote: Maurice Fischer's death triggers the mission timeline — the team must act now to intercept Robert Fischer.

scenes.heading: INT. DEPARTURE GATE, SYDNEY - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb and Saito watch Fischer's father's coffin being loaded onto a plane, and Saito promises to make one phone call that will clear Cobb's immigration troubles if the job is completed.

scenes.heading: INT. FIRST CLASS CABIN, 747 - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The team boards the first class cabin, Eames blocks Fischer and steals his passport while letting him pass, and all team members take their assigned seats.

scenes.heading: EXT. RUNWAY - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: The 747 hurtles down the runway for takeoff.

scenes.heading: INT. FIRST CLASS CABIN, 747 - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Cobb returns Fischer's passport and strikes up a conversation, and Fischer accepts a drink from the flight attendant.

scenes.heading: EXT. 747 - LATER
scenes.summary: The plane soars through a burning cloudscape.

scenes.heading: INT. FIRST CLASS CABIN, 747 - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Cobb confirms Fischer is asleep, the team retrieves the dream mechanism, and Arthur injects Fischer and connects all team members to the shared dream.
scenes.turningPointNote: The inception mission begins — the team enters Fischer's dream.

scenes.heading: INT. SEDAN - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb drives through rain with Saito and Arthur in the back seat, then pulls over.

scenes.heading: EXT. NEW YORK STREETS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Yusuf stands on a rainy corner with a silver briefcase and reaches for the car door.

scenes.heading: INT. SEDAN - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Yusuf and Eames climb into the car soaked from rain, and the team jokes about Yusuf's bladder causing the rain in the dream.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. SEDAN ON RAINY NEW YORK STREETS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb rear-ends a yellow cab, threatens the cabdriver with a silenced pistol, and Arthur takes over the cab to pick up Fischer.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. CAB ON RAINY NEW YORK STREETS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur picks up Fischer in the cab, Eames and Saito get in with a gun, Fischer tosses his wallet at them contemptuously, then gunfire shatters the windows and Arthur speeds away.

scenes.heading: EXT. WAREHOUSE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: The sedan and cab pull into a warehouse and Eames pulls down the shutter behind them.

scenes.heading: INT. WAREHOUSE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The team hustles Fischer inside while Cobb discovers Saito has been shot, and Cobb angrily confronts Arthur about being ambushed by trained projections that should have shown up in the research.
scenes.turningPointNote: Saito is critically wounded and Fischer's subconscious is militarized — the mission is now far more dangerous than planned.

scenes.heading: INT. OFFICE, WAREHOUSE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Arthur examines the wounded Saito and angrily confronts Cobb about the risks of going three layers deep, revealing Cobb promised Yusuf his whole share and claiming Cobb did this before with Mal.

scenes.heading: INT. BATHROOM, WAREHOUSE - LATER
scenes.summary: Cobb and Arthur interrogate Fischer about his father's safe combination, and Fischer claims he doesn't know it despite their assertion that they have good authority he does.

scenes.heading: INT. OFFICE, WAREHOUSE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Yusuf finds a snapshot of young Robert with his father and homemade pinwheel in Fischer's wallet, and Eames transforms into Browning using the hinged mirror.

scenes.heading: INT. BATHROOM, WAREHOUSE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Fischer hears Browning's cries and recognizes his uncle's voice, then begs to talk to him when told Browning is the good authority who said Fischer knows the combination.

scenes.heading: INT. BATHROOM, WAREHOUSE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Cobb brings the bloody and bruised Browning to Fischer, handcuffs him to the sink, and leaves them with one hour to talk.

scenes.heading: INT. OFFICE, WAREHOUSE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb tells Ariadne that if Saito dies in the dream he'll be trapped in Limbo and wake up with his mind completely gone, having forgotten their arrangement and believing Limbo is reality.

scenes.heading: INT. MAL'S CHILDHOOD HOME - DAY
scenes.summary: Mal places her spinning top inside the safe in the doll's house and locks it away, having decided to forget that their world wasn't real.

scenes.heading: INT. OFFICE, WAREHOUSE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb tells Ariadne that when they woke from Limbo, Mal was possessed by the idea that their world was not real and they needed to wake up again by killing themselves.

scenes.heading: INT. COBB AND MAL'S KITCHEN - DAY (FLASHBACK)
scenes.summary: Cobb tries to calm a hysterical Mal who believes they must kill themselves to get home.

scenes.heading: INT. WORKSHOP - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb tells Ariadne that Mal believed their children weren't real and that their real children were waiting somewhere above.

scenes.heading: INT. COBB AND MAL'S KITCHEN - DAY (FLASHBACK)
scenes.summary: Mal tells Cobb the children are projections from his dreams, and Cobb tearfully asks why he can't control or stop this if it's his dream, while Mal explains she loved him too much to go without him.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEGANT HOTEL CORRIDOR - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)
scenes.summary: Cobb walks along a hotel corridor checking door numbers against a key on their anniversary.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEGANT HOTEL SUITE - CONTINUOUS (FLASHBACK)
scenes.summary: Cobb enters the hotel suite and finds the room disheveled with dinner spread across the floor, a broken champagne glass, and Mal's spinning top, then feels a draught from the window.

scenes.heading: EXT. EXTERIOR ATRIUM - CONTINUOUS (FLASHBACK)
scenes.summary: Cobb finds Mal sitting on a ledge outside the window threatening to jump, and she demands he join her or she'll jump immediately, forcing him to climb out onto the ledge with her.
scenes.turningPointNote: Mal's suicide threat and Cobb's forced choice on the ledge — the pivotal traumatic event that defines Cobb's guilt and drives the entire story.

scenes.heading: INT. OFFICE, WAREHOUSE - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb remembers that Mal's letter to authorities refuted all claims about her sanity that she knew he would make.

scenes.heading: INT. COBB AND MAL’S KITCHEN - DAY (FLASHBACK)
scenes.summary: Cobb stands with the thin man holding a piece of paper while his children play in the garden with faces unseen, and the thin man tells him it's right now or never as the children run off.

scenes.heading: INT. OFFICE, WAREHOUSE - DAY
scenes.summary: Ariadne tells Cobb that Mal's idea that her world wasn't real came from her own mind, not his, and his guilt is defining her projection, but Cobb remains silent.

scenes.heading: INT. BATHROOM, WAREHOUSE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Browning tells Fischer that Maurice's alternate will would split Fischer Morrow into individual companies and leave Fischer with nothing, and Fischer realizes his father wanted him to be his own man.
scenes.turningPointNote: Fischer experiences the emotional revelation about his father's true intentions — the inception idea begins to take root.

scenes.heading: INT. WAREHOUSE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The team drags Fischer and Browning to the van, Arthur sedates Fischer, and Eames reveals Fischer's relationship with his father is much worse than they thought.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN ON RAINY STREETS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The van drives through rainy streets while the team discusses shifting Fischer's antipathy from his father onto Browning and using Mr. Charles despite Arthur's objection that it didn't work before.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY BAR - SUNSET
scenes.summary: Fischer nurses a drink at the hotel bar when a blonde woman speaks to him, and he notices several stern-looking characters paying him too much attention.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur and Ariadne watch from across the lobby as Cobb moves toward Fischer, and Arthur explains that Mr. Charles is a gambit designed to turn Fischer against his own subconscious.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY BAR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb approaches Fischer at the hotel bar posing as Rod Green from Marketing, and the Blonde woman leaves Fischer a napkin with six digits before departing, drawing Sub-security away.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur watches the Sub-security follow the Blonde while Ariadne questions why Arthur disapproves of telling the mark he's dreaming, and Arthur notes that Cobb frequently does things he says never to do.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY BAR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb reveals to Fischer that the Blonde stole his wallet and introduces himself as Mr. Charles, claiming to be in charge of Fischer's security.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The Blonde pushes Saito into an elevator as Sub-security approaches.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEVATOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: In the elevator's infinite mirror reflections, Saito discovers the Blonde is actually Eames in disguise, and a shudder ripples through the elevator from turbulence.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN ON RAINY DOWNTOWN STREETS - DAY
scenes.summary: Yusuf fights the wheel as the van cuts through an alley pursued by three S.U.V.s, smashing trash cans while the sleepers shake in the back.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY BAR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: A tremor echoes through the bar as Cobb tells Fischer he works in subconscious security, and Cobb notices his two children crouched nearby and bar patrons staring at him suspiciously.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEVATOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eames finds a snapshot of young Robert with his father and a homemade pinwheel in Fischer's wallet, then hands the wallet to Saito and instructs him to dump it to buy Cobb more time.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY BAR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb warns Fischer he's not safe as suited men approach, and a clap of thunder echoes through the bar.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN ON RAINY DOWNTOWN STREETS - DAY
scenes.summary: Gunshots blast out the van's windows as a Security Man leans from an S.U.V. with a shotgun, wind and rain whipping through the van over Arthur's sleeping face.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY BAR - SUNSET
scenes.summary: Fischer notices the sudden hurricane-like rain and a tremor running through the bar as Cobb draws his attention to the strange weather.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur explains to Ariadne that Cobb is drawing Fischer's attention to the dream's strangeness, causing Fischer's subconscious to look for the dreamer, which is Arthur.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN ON RAINY STREETS - DAY
scenes.summary: Yusuf throws the van into a hard right turn in extreme slow motion, centrifugal force drawing the sleepers to one side.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY BAR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The liquid in Fischer's drink rises against one side of the glass as the entire room tilts at a 45-degree angle, and Cobb tells Fischer they're in a dream.
scenes.turningPointNote: Cobb reveals to Fischer that he's dreaming, executing the Mr. Charles gambit that shifts the entire extraction strategy.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN ON RAINY STREETS - DAY
scenes.summary: Yusuf straightens up the van and races down the street, swerving through traffic.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY BAR - EVENING
scenes.summary: The building eases back into alignment as Cobb explains to Fischer that he's a projection placed to protect Fischer from extractors, and Fischer nods at the approaching Security Men.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY - EVENING
scenes.summary: Cobb escorts Fischer across the lobby past the two children, then pushes Fischer into the bathroom as Sub-security follows.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY BATHROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb kicks the first man to the ground and shoots both Sub-security men as they enter the bathroom, then shows Fischer the guns they were carrying to prove they were extractors.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito drops Fischer's wallet into a garbage chute and slips into the stairwell as a Security Man pauses at the chute.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur leads Ariadne to room 491.

scenes.heading: INT. ROOM 491 - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur opens the room safe and pulls out four bricks of plastic explosive, explaining the room should be directly below 528.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY BATHROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Fischer remembers being in the back of a van with Uncle Peter and a safe, and Cobb explains the gravity shifts and difficulty remembering are from his body bouncing in the van.

scenes.heading: INT. ROOM 491 - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur attaches explosives to the ceiling and explains to Ariadne that he must time the kick by waiting for Yusuf's music and the van hitting the bridge barrier before blowing the floor.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito mistakes Browning for Eames, then Eames explains that Browning is Fischer's projection and they'll watch how he behaves to see if Fischer suspects his motives.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR, FIFTH FLOOR - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Cobb leads Fischer to room 528 and kicks the door open with his gun drawn.

scenes.heading: INT. ROOM 528 - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The team searches the empty room and finds an extraction mechanism, then Arthur grabs Browning as he enters with a key to 528, and Fischer stares disbelieving at his godfather.
scenes.turningPointNote: Browning is caught entering room 528 with a key, implicating him as the extractor and betraying Fischer's trust in his godfather.

scenes.heading: EXT. SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb and Ariadne stand on a snow-covered cliff in white snowsuits examining a fortified medical facility below, and Cobb tells Eames he needs him to draw security away while Ariadne guides Fischer in.

scenes.heading: INT. ROOM 528 - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur checks the mechanism in room 528, hears low booms like thunder, checks his watch showing the second hand crawling forward, then heads into the corridor.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN ON RAINY DOWNTOWN STREETS - DAY
scenes.summary: Yusuf drives as a motorcycle passenger fires a shotgun at the van, and Yusuf grabs the shotgun barrel and pulls the passenger from the bike.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur walks toward the elevator and a Security Man emerges heading right for him, so Arthur takes a turn and speeds up as the booms grow louder.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN ON RAINY DOWNTOWN STREETS - DAY
scenes.summary: The motorcycle driver fires a handgun as an S.U.V. lines up to intercept, Yusuf hits the brakes forcing the bike into the S.U.V.'s path, then the van races onto a freeway ramp approaching the bridge where an S.U.V. smashes into its side and forces it against a crash barrier.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The corridor tilts and Arthur runs up onto the wall, rounds a corner into another Security Man, and they struggle as the corridor spins throwing them onto walls and ceiling before dropping through a door.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL ROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The fight continues all over the spinning room.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN ON RAINY OFF RAMP NEAR BRIDGE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sleeping Arthur bounces around as the van tilts, scrapes along the barrier, clears the end and rolls down the embankment.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur lands on top of the Security Man, gets up, and heads to the stairwell.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN ON RAINY STREETS NEAR BRIDGE - DAY
scenes.summary: The van settles with a thump and Yusuf realizes he's in one piece, then sees the bridge barriers coming down and races toward it, just making it across before an S.U.V. rips its rear axle off and a Security Man starts firing.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL STAIRWELL - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur races down the stairwell, spots Security Men outside room 491, darts back into the stairwell and races down as they follow and start shooting.

scenes.heading: EXT. SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - DAY
scenes.summary: Eames skis down within sight of the hospital complex and lets off a flare.

scenes.heading: EXT. HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Security Men on the ramparts spot the flare and send patrols out on skis and snowmobiles to investigate.

scenes.heading: EXT. SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eames watches the patrols close in, then launches himself down the mountain streaking across the icy slope.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN ON RAINY RISING BRIDGE - DAY
scenes.summary: Yusuf pulls forward to line up a backwards run at the edge as vicious fire hammers the vehicle, checks his watch, then places headphones on sleeping Arthur's head and hits play on Edith Piaf's music.
scenes.turningPointNote: Yusuf initiates the kick sequence by playing the music cue, starting the countdown for all dream levels to synchronize their exits.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL STAIRWELL - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur stops in the stairwell hearing massive low-end musical tones and panics that Yusuf started too soon as shots slam around him.

scenes.heading: EXT. SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb and Ariadne make their way down toward the complex and Cobb listens to the unusually low wind sounds.

scenes.heading: EXT. FOREST, SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eames whispers over radio from his hiding position at the base of trees as a patrol passes beneath him.

scenes.heading: EXT. SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb realizes the wind is actually music and tells the team they need to move fast.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAINS, THE OTHER SIDE OF THE COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito and Fischer climb down a cliff face above the complex, and Saito reports they're going as fast as they can.

scenes.heading: EXT. SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb calculates they have about sixty minutes and asks Ariadne if Fischer and Saito can make it on their route, and she says they don't have enough time because they still need to climb down to the middle terrace.

scenes.heading: EXT. FOREST, SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eames cannot answer as he slaloms through the forest with Sub-security in hot pursuit, bullets smashing into the trunks.

scenes.heading: EXT. SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ariadne reveals to Cobb that Eames added an air duct system that doesn't follow the maze and can take Fischer straight from the outer walls to the upper tower.

scenes.heading: EXT. CLIFF FACE BEHIND COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito uses a hammer to tap in a belay on the cliff face as Ariadne prepares to explain the new route over radio.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN ON RAINY RAISED BRIDGE - DAY
scenes.summary: Yusuf gives the Security Man in the S.U.V. the finger and hits the gas, racing backwards at the barrier.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL STAIRWAY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur runs up the stairs and impossibly arrives behind a confused Security Man at the edge of a drop, pushes him over, then races to the fourth floor.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN ON RAINY RAISED BRIDGE - DAY
scenes.summary: The van smashes through the concrete barrier in slow motion.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur sprints down the corridor when a tremendous crash sends him flying into the air.

scenes.heading: EXT. SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - DAY
scenes.summary: A massive rumble prompts Cobb to look across the valley.

scenes.heading: EXT. FOREST, SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eames shoots out of the trees and falls to the snow as he sees the slope falling away in an avalanche.

scenes.heading: EXT. CLIFF FACE BEHIND COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito hears the rumble, warns Fischer below, cuts the rope so they both fall and slide down the slope, clearing the avalanche's path.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN - DAY
scenes.summary: In extreme slow motion, the van emerges from the concrete balustrade and starts falling.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur flies through the corridor without landing as gravity disappears, scrambling to grab a sconce.

scenes.heading: EXT. SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb watches the avalanche cloud slide past the complex and tells Ariadne it was the kick they missed.

scenes.heading: EXT. FOREST, SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eames lies on the snow and asks what they do now; Cobb tells him to finish the job before the next kick.

scenes.heading: EXT. SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb tells Ariadne they have about twenty minutes until the van hits the water, and they move towards the base of the complex.

scenes.heading: EXT. HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito and Fischer run around the building, find an exhaust port, blow the grill charge, and climb into the open vent.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN - DAY
scenes.summary: In extreme slow motion, the van seems suspended in mid-air ten stories above the river.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: In zero gravity, Arthur pulls himself to room 491, opens it, looks at the charges on the ceiling, and pulls them down while hurrying.

scenes.heading: INT. DUCT SYSTEM, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito and Fischer hurry through the duct system with Saito falling behind and coughing up blood.

scenes.heading: EXT. UPPER TERRACE, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb grabs and strangles a Security Guard unconscious, beckons Ariadne to run to him, and they enter the south tower.

scenes.heading: INT. TOP ROOM, SOUTH TOWER, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb and Ariadne enter the tower, Cobb shoots the guard, and they discuss the antechamber and strongroom while Cobb sets up his sniper rifle to watch three guards on the balcony.

scenes.heading: EXT. FOREST, SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eames watches the patrols heading back towards the complex and warns the team they're coming.

scenes.heading: INT. TOP ROOM, SOUTH TOWER, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb hears Eames's warning and tells him to buy them some time.

scenes.heading: EXT. FOREST, SNOW-COVERED MOUNTAINS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eames takes off towards the base of the complex.

scenes.heading: INT. ROOM 528 - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur floats into room 528 where the sleepers are floating, and he pulls Cobb towards Eames.

scenes.heading: INT. DUCT SYSTEM, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - DAY
scenes.summary: Saito and Fischer approach the grate exit; Saito slumps pale and shivering, and Fischer takes the radio to whisper into it.

scenes.heading: INT. TOP ROOM, SOUTH TOWER, HOSPITAL COMPLEC - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb scans the anteroom through his scope and tells Fischer it's clear but to hurry as an army approaches.

scenes.heading: INT. DUCT SYSTEM, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Fischer grabs the radio and turns the volume to zero as he starts to remove the grate.

scenes.heading: EXT. BASE OF THE HOPISTAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eames sets mines along the lowest wall of the structure above a sheer drop.

scenes.heading: INT. TOP ROOM, SOUTH TOWER, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb spots someone through his scope above the main windows and prepares to fire while Ariadne grabs the radio to warn Fischer it's a trap.

scenes.heading: INT. DUCT SYSTEM, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Fischer does not see the flashing light on his radio as he carefully lifts the grate and motions for Saito to stay.

scenes.heading: INT. TOP ROOM, SOUTH TOWER, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb tenses to fire, freezes when he sees Mal in his sights, and tells Ariadne he doesn't know if it's really her as Fischer climbs out of the vent.

scenes.heading: INT. ANTECHAMBER - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Fischer moves into the antechamber and turns up the radio volume as Mal drops behind him and greets him.

scenes.heading: INT. TOP ROOM, SOUTH TOWER, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ariadne tells Cobb that Mal is just a projection and Fischer is real; Cobb turns back to the scope too late as Mal shoots Fischer, and Cobb reflexively shoots Mal.
scenes.turningPointNote: Mal kills Fischer, destroying the inception mission and forcing the team into limbo to retrieve him — the central plan has catastrophically failed due to Cobb's hesitation.

scenes.heading: INT. DUCT SYSTEM, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito starts as he hears the shot and begins edging forward, clutching his belly.

scenes.heading: INT. ROOM 528 - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur pulls bedding from the bed and uses the sheet to bind the floating sleepers together.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN - DAY
scenes.summary: In extreme slow motion, the van creeps downwards, still high above the river.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur pushes the floating stack of sleepers to the elevator, hits the button, pushes them in, grabs the charges, and climbs through the ceiling hatch.

scenes.heading: INT. DUCT SYSTEM, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - DAY
scenes.summary: Eames steps over Saito, who looks up at him with dying eyes.

scenes.heading: INT. ANTECHAMBER, HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY
scenes.summary: Eames finds Cobb and Ariadne standing over Fischer and Mal's bodies; Cobb admits he wouldn't shoot Mal and that Fischer's mind is trapped, but Ariadne proposes they follow Fischer down into limbo where time will be enough to complete inception and bring him back.
scenes.turningPointNote: The team decides to go into limbo to rescue Fischer and complete the inception — a desperate last-ditch plan that fundamentally changes the mission's stakes and structure.

scenes.heading: EXT. COAST (LIMBO) - DAY
scenes.summary: Ariadne wakes in the surf of limbo staring at a cloudless sky and sees urban buildings decaying into the ocean; Cobb wades toward her and confirms this is his world and where Mal will be.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEVATOR SHAFT - DAY
scenes.summary: Arthur floats on top of the elevator, plants charges on the emergency brakes and cable, sets them, pushes away, and hits the detonator in slow motion.

scenes.heading: INT. ANTECHAMBER - DAY
scenes.summary: Eames races around at full speed getting the defibrillator paddles, pulls Saito up and hands him a handgun to cover Fischer, then lays down covering fire and heads outside.

scenes.heading: EXT. HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eames races along the upper terrace dodging fire as bullets shatter a window behind him in slow motion.

scenes.heading: EXT. COAST (LIMBO)- DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb and Ariadne climb out of the waves and move through the deserted streets of crumbling buildings; Ariadne marvels at the architecture while Cobb explains they built it together, and he sees his children running down a side street before emerging into a square.

scenes.heading: INT. SKYSCRAPER LOBBY (LIMBO) - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb leads Ariadne across the skyscraper lobby to the elevators, explaining they both wanted a house and loved skyscrapers.

scenes.heading: INT. SKYSCRAPER ELEVATOR (LIMBO) - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb pulls out his handgun and bullets, tells Ariadne they need a kick to send Fischer back, says he'll improvise, cocks his weapon, and stops Ariadne from exiting to explain that an idea is like a virus.

scenes.heading: INT. PENTHOUSE (LIMBO) - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Cobb and Ariadne step into the penthouse and move down the corridor as Cobb explains how resilient and contagious an idea can be; they find Mal sitting at the kitchen table with her back to them.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEVATOR SHAFT - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur flies back down the shaft to the elevator, squeezes past the car to the bottom, and starts setting the main charges across the bottom.

scenes.heading: INT. PENTHOUSE (LIMBO) - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb touches Mal's arm and she turns angrily holding a carving knife, questioning Ariadne's certainty about reality and accusing Cobb of being as lost as she was while Cobb insists he knows what's real.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEVATOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur scrambles to arrange the sleepers on the elevator floor, sees blood on his hand from Saito's belly wound, and sticks headphones on sleeping Eames.

scenes.heading: INT. HOSPITAL FORTRESS - DAY
scenes.summary: Eames throws a grenade blowing up security forces, ducks to avoid heavy fire, and starts unpacking and setting charges along the base of the terraces.

scenes.heading: INT. DUCT SYSTEM, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito looks up as he hears a Security Guard climbing through the duct and raises his gun, trembling with weakness.

scenes.heading: INT. KITCHEN, PENTHOUSE (LIMBO) - DAY
scenes.summary: Mal challenges Cobb's belief that their children are waiting above, showing him the kids who start to turn before he closes his eyes, and she questions what he truly believes versus knows while he admits he feels guilt that reminds him something is wrong.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEVATOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur hits play on his music player and Edith Piaf begins to ring out as he checks his detonator.

scenes.heading: INT. ANTECHAMBER - DAY
scenes.summary: Eames races back into the antechamber, notices massive low musical tones in the relative quiet, drops his gun and goes to Fischer's side.

scenes.heading: INT. DUCT SYSTEM, HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Saito musters his remaining strength to fire at and drop an emerging guard, then collapses and dies as the gun clatters to the floor.

scenes.heading: INT. ANTECHAMBER - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Eames powers up the defibrillator, places the paddles on Fischer's chest, and shocks him.

scenes.heading: INT. PENTHOUSE (LIMBO)-DAY
scenes.summary: Lightning crackles across the sky as Cobb offers to stay if Ariadne can take Fischer back, and Mal reveals Fischer is on the porch while Ariadne goes to check if he's alive.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEVATOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur nods his head in time with the music, counting down while holding the detonator and bracing himself.

scenes.heading: INT. ANTECHAMBER - DAY
scenes.summary: Eames recharges the defibrillator and shocks Fischer again.

scenes.heading: EXT. PORCH, PENTHOUSE (LIMBO) - DAY
scenes.summary: Ariadne finds Fischer bound and bloody on the porch as lightning strikes, tells Cobb it's time and he must come back to his children, but Cobb insists he must stay to find Saito who is now dead and therefore in limbo.
scenes.turningPointNote: Cobb commits to staying in limbo to find Saito rather than returning with the team, a critical sacrifice that puts his own escape at risk.

scenes.heading: INT. ANTECHAMBER - DAY
scenes.summary: Eames pulls the defibrillator from Fischer's chest as Fischer coughs awake, and Eames tells him to get into the strongroom quickly as Fischer staggers to his feet and pushes open the double doors.

scenes.heading: INT. STRONGROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Fischer walks into the silent white strongroom and sees his dying father lying in a bed, breathing with tremendous difficulty.

scenes.heading: EXT. PENTHOUSE (LIMBO) - DAY
scenes.summary: Ariadne takes aim at Mal but Cobb stops her and she lowers the gun, while Eames grabs the detonator and moves to the strongroom door.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEVATOR, HOTEL - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Arthur hits the detonator.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEVATOR SHAFT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: The charges on the bottom of the elevator explode and flames balloon in extreme slow motion.

scenes.heading: INT. STRONGROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Fischer approaches his dying father who whispers that he was disappointed Fischer tried to be him rather than himself, then the father dies as a rumble builds.
scenes.turningPointNote: The inception is completed—Fischer receives the emotional revelation from his father that will change his perspective, the core objective of the entire mission.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEVATOR SHAFT - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The elevator car is rocketed along its track by the explosion.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEVATOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Arthur is smashed against the floor of the elevator car next to the sleepers who shudder with the force of acceleration.

scenes.heading: INT. ANTECHAMBER - DAY
scenes.summary: Eames watches Fischer and mutters to himself urging him to come on.

scenes.heading: INT. STRONGROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Fischer's father reaches for the safe, Fischer opens it with the code to find the will and a homemade pinwheel he made as a child, marvels at it, then turns to find his father dead as Eames hits the detonator.

scenes.heading: EXT. HOSPITAL COMPLEX - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: A line of explosions rips along the lower wall and the entire hospital building starts to slide down the mountain.

scenes.heading: EXT. PENTHOUSE (LIMBO) - DAY
scenes.summary: A fierce wind howls through the penthouse as the sky darkens, Cobb tells Ariadne that's the kick and she must go, he's staying to find Saito and say goodbye to Mal, and Ariadne lets the wind pull her off the edge.

scenes.heading: INT. ANTECHAMBER - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ariadne drops as the floor collapses and her eyes snap open.

scenes.heading: EXT. PENTHOUSE (LIMBO) - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb holds Mal as the wind dies and tells her they can't be together forever despite his promise, remembering how they grew old together in limbo before lying down on the railroad track, and he says he has to let her go.
scenes.turningPointNote: Cobb finally releases Mal and his guilt, the emotional core of his arc, choosing to let go of his projection of her to move forward.

scenes.heading: INT. STRONGROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Fischer and his father's body drop away.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEVATOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Ariadne drops inside the rocketing elevator and smashes into the water as the elevator smashes into the top of the shaft.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. VAN INTO RIVER - DAY
scenes.summary: The van crunches into the water which crashes through broken windows flooding the interior, Fischer's eyes open panicking, he unbuckles himself, pushes out the window, then goes back to unbuckle Browning and drag him out.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVER - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Fischer breaks the surface with Browning who coughs and gasps, and Fischer starts pulling him toward the near bank through the rain-impacted water.

scenes.heading: INT. VAN, UNDERWATER - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Ariadne, Arthur and Yusuf wait calmly underwater sharing two regulators, Arthur turns to find Saito's eyes lifeless with blood in the water and no pulse, then checks Cobb whose eyes are also lifeless before Ariadne pulls Arthur away.

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVERBANK - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Fischer turns Browning over on the riverbank and tells him the will means his dad wanted him to be his own man, and in the puddle beside them Browning's reflection is revealed to be Eames.

scenes.heading: EXT. UNDERNEATH BRIDGE IN THE RAIN - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Arthur sits on the riverbank breathing heavily and Ariadne tells him Cobb stayed to find Saito, and Arthur says Cobb will be lost but Ariadne insists he'll be alright.

scenes.heading: EXT. DAWN. CRASHING SURF.
scenes.summary: Waves toss an older, bearded, weary Cobb onto wet sand and a Japanese security guard turns him onto his back.

scenes.heading: INT. DINING ROOM, CASTLE - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb wolfs his food while the elderly Saito watches and asks if Cobb came to kill him, Saito recognizes Cobb from his half-remembered dream despite being an old man now, and Cobb says he came back to remind Saito of what he once knew.
scenes.turningPointNote: Cobb finds Saito in limbo and begins to bring him back, fulfilling his commitment and enabling their escape from the deepest dream level.

scenes.heading: INT. FIRST CLASS CABIN, 747 - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb's eyes flicker open on the plane, he takes a hot towel, Ariadne smiles relieved, the flight attendant says they'll land in Los Angeles in twenty minutes, and Saito watches Cobb seriously then picks up the phone and dials as Cobb nods thanks.
scenes.turningPointNote: The team successfully wakes from the dream and Saito makes the call to honor his promise, setting up Cobb's return home.

scenes.heading: INT. ARRIVALS, LAX - LATER
scenes.summary: Cobb nervously hands his passport to the immigration official who stamps it after a beat, he exchanges subtle greetings with the team members as he passes through baggage claim and brushes past Fischer, then spots Professor Miles in the arrivals hall.
scenes.turningPointNote: Cobb successfully passes through immigration without arrest, the external obstacle to his return home is overcome.

scenes.heading: INT. KITCHEN, COBB AND MAL'S HOUSE - DAY
scenes.summary: Cobb enters the kitchen with Miles, drops his bags, spins his totem on the table, looks up to see James and Philippa playing in the garden with their faces turned away, Miles knocks on the window and the children turn to see their father and run toward him while behind Cobb the spinning top remains on the table.
scenes.turningPointNote: Cobb reunites with his children in the final scene, achieving his goal, though the ambiguous spinning top leaves his reality uncertain.
